an5.218:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, there are these five dangers in conduct that does not inspire confidence. What five?
Those without confidence do not gain confidence; some of those with confidence change their minds; the teaching of the Teacher is not carried out;
the next generation follow one's example; and one's own mind does not become placid.
These are the five dangers in conduct that does not inspire confidence.
an5.218:1.2:
2
"Bhikkhus, there are these five benefits in conduct that inspires confidence. What five? Those without confidence gain confidence; those with confidence increase
; the teaching of the Teacher is carried out;
the next generation follow one's example; and one's own mind becomes placid. These are the five benefits in conduct that inspires confidence."
